label: Kick glow burst — blur_kick + lvc_kick + comp_kick composite layer
notes: Added a glow burst composite layer driven by sub_bass. Takes the palette-mapped output (ramp_lookup), blurs it heavily (70px gaussian), then adds it back on top via comp_kick (Add mode). lvc_kick.brightness1 = sub_bass * 1.5 — at quiet (0.06): adds ~0.09x of the blurred frame (invisible). At kick peak (0.81): adds ~1.22x of the blurred frame (strong bloom burst). Using palette-mapped source ensures the burst color matches the ice-fire palette already in use. Signal chain: ramp_lookup → comp_kick (input0) + [ramp_lookup → blur_kick → lvc_kick] (input1) → null_underwater_out.
